# MuleSoft Financial Services

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.12) of Financial Services documentation.
> See [Financial Services llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/llms-full.txt) for all the Financial Services documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Anypoint MQ Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/anypointmq-setup-guide.md)
- [MuleSoft Accelerator for Financial Services](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/index.md)
- [Payments Modernization Demo Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/payments-setup-guide.md)
- [Prerequisites for MuleSoft Accelerator for Financial Services](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/prerequisites.md)
- [RPA Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/rpa-setup-guide.md)
- [Optimize Customer Experiences Use Case Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/sfdc-data-cloud-setup-guide.md)
- [Salesforce Financial Services Cloud Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/sfdc-fsc-setup-guide.md)
- [Salesforce Marketing Cloud Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/sfdc-mc-setup-guide.md)
- [Upgrade Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/financial-services/latest/upgrade-notes.md)
